privileged_info_summary: Case 0018 is a real surgical case from the VitalDB open dataset (6,388 real surgical cases from Seoul National University Hospital), not synthetic data. The metadata accurately references this case which is publicly available via PhysioNet. However, the local test environment does not contain case_0018.vital; it only has test cases 0001-0003. The 30-minute timepoint is a reasonable surgical reference point. Output requirements (50KB minimum PNG at 800x400+ resolution) are appropriate for medical waveform screenshots.
